hero.title: Less counting matters
hero.description: DiabCam is an intelligent AI meal scanner that relieves you from tedious data entry. Just take a photo, and our technology does the rest.

features.title: 3 ways to add a meal
features.photoDesc: Artificial intelligence recognizes dishes based on a photo. AI identifies ingredients and provides nutritional values.
features.describeDesc: Voice or text analysis. Just say "chicken breast with broccoli" and the app will handle the rest.
features.searchDesc: Scan barcodes or search a database of over 5 million products.

diets.subtitle: Explore benefits tailored to your needs
diets.diabeticDesc: Precise estimation of WW (Carbohydrate Units) and WBT (Protein-Fat Units). Control of GI and Glycemic Load.
diets.ketoDesc: Automatic tracking of net carbs and macronutrient ratios optimized for your needs.
diets.fitnessDesc: Monitor macronutrients and calories without the need to manually weigh every product.

stats.title: Diary & Statistics
stats.desc: Clear history of your nutrition and PDF reports that you can analyze with your dietitian.
